string 2: Parallelmon is here already...?!

Th-They came outta nowhere!
There's no way I can set up my camera in time...!
...Shouldn't we be getting out of here?!

Oh! The door's open!
Let's hide!

If we use these doors to our advantage, 
we should be able to safely sneak past Parallelmon.

This is an Akashic Backdoor—a pathway that connects 
points in time and space together haphazardly.

Beyond such doors, past, present, and future are chaotically
shuffled... then merged together, with no regard to order.

This isn't necessarily the same Shinjuku you're familiar with.
You should proceed with caution.
What does it all mean...?

What we're looking at is the "old" Shinjuku... 
back before the apocalypse came knocking on our doors!
This... used to be a peaceful place?

That's right. You don't see this kind of beauty
anymore in the world I come from.
I see... This must be difficult for you.

I believe this woman comes from a future in which the global
collapse has already started—a post-Shinjuku Inferno world.

It was this incident you call the Shinjuku Inferno
that fueled Parallelmon's rise to power.

It led to numerous space-time disturbances which Parallelmon
used to its advantage in order to grow stronger.

Bring us back to our own world, right now!
Prepare yourself!
Calm down!
Oh... What am I even doing?!
You didn't come back, so I was starting to worry.

Sorry about that.
Before I knew it, the way back was blocked off.
But enough about me... Who are those humans?

It's another Bancho! 
Wow, this makes for an amazing shot!

Teaming up with others from different worlds 
and different times...? I love it. I'm in.

That reminds me... There was something weird
in the room back there. I think we should check it out.
All right. Let's go take a look.
Over there—that thing, you see?
Is that... me?
That was the day I saw Inori for the last time...

I still see it in my dreams.
If only I hadn't fainted then...

If I had known it was gonna be the last time,
I would've said so much more...
I miss you, Inori.
Wait... What just happened?

I have no idea. I suppose we should
keep looking elsewhere.

BanchoLillymon, you should go back to the square 
where we met the warrior in white and get some rest.
Certainly not! I am going with you!
Aren't you tired after all this exploring?
How could I be tired at a time like this?
I simply... want to be by your side...

Eh? What're you trying to say?
Spit it out, already.
Urk...! Fine! Just go wherever you want, then!
That's...!
Are you another one of Parallelmon's goons?!
Is that another friend of yours?
No, definitely not.

I imagine he's another victim of Parallelmon
that's been sent here from another world.
However...

I can tell by your GAKU-RAN... your jacket.
You're no ordinary Digimon.

When a Bancho's life reaches its end,
their title is passed down to a worthy successor.
It seems this Digimon was passed the torch.

Hey. So I'm guessing you got blasted here
by Parallelmon too, huh?

As a fellow Bancho, I already know
what you're gonna say.

Yeah. Let's team up and beat the daylights
out of Parallelmon, together.

Not a bad idea. But if we're going to fight together,
we have to get something out of the way first. Isn't that right?

Yeah. I need to know if I can trust you to have my back.
And the quickest way to do that... Is with our fists!
Hell yes! Let's do this, Digimon y Digimon.
I-I'm not sure I see the logic here!

"Who is the true Bancho?! It's a one-on-one battle
between worlds! You won't believe who wins!"
Ouch...
Not bad... Not bad at all.
Yes, you are indeed a true Bancho.

I, too, felt a sense of integrity in your blows. 
Now, let us fight alongside one another— No, wait...
I believe the word I'm looking for is "collab."
"Collab"...?
It's a bond forged between those who bump fists together.

Haha... I like that. Okay, let's get out there
and show 'em what we've got, brother.
Th-They've managed to reach some kind of understanding!

Although, I imagine you must've taken quite a beating,
absorbing so many of my blows.

There's a friend of mine resting in the square.
You should probably recuperate there for a while, too.

I appreciate your concern. 
You really do pack quite a punch.

We'll need you when the final battle comes around.
Go and rest up until then.
Oh, one of these again...

After Inori disappeared, I became
completely obsessed with making videos.
I was filming like a maniac each and every day.

My channel continued to gain subscribers,
and with that, my revenue started to grow, too.

I worked desperately to earn the money I needed
in order to reach out to Inori and the others—

—to ask them "Where have you gone?",
and to tell them "I'm still right here."
There it goes again... What's up with these things?

I'm not sure... Looks like we've got no choice
but to keep investigating.
A Digimon I've never met before...
Were you hit by Parallelmon's beam of light, too?
Why don't you answer me?

I see... So you also have a GAKU-RAN jacket
over your shoulders...
You know, some say silence is a virtue.

If you are truly worthy of that GAKU-RAN...
Then let your fists do the talking.
That doesn't sound ominous at all... Heh.

Yeah, he's definitely a Bancho all right. He's got the strength
needed to lead, no matter where he might be from.

If you're looking for a fight, you've got one.
But at least tell me your name.

I'm BanchoGolemon.
And you are?

The name's BanchoLeomon.
I'm sorry, but I'm not going to hold back.

Like you said, it's time to let our fists do the talking.
But I don't think you're gonna like this conversation.

Talk all you want—you can't hide your insecurity from me.
Digimon like you... You're all bark, no bite.

I'll show you the strength I gained, 
training deep within Mugen Mountain.

"Bancho-on-Bancho violence?! You need to see this! 
Find out if these two reach some kind of understanding!"
Well? How did you like the taste of my fists?

Just telling you with words seems too boorish...
I'd rather tell you with my actions...
...brother.
I believe I now understand everything you wanted to say.

They've reached a mutual understanding...
I guess their fists really DID do the talking!

Let's work together to take down Parallelmon. 
What do you say we have ourselves a "collab"?

A "col"-what? What's that? 
Some kind of super powerful move?
It's a bond forged between those who bump fists.
I see... I like the sound of that.
How does this keep on working?!

But you must've suffered no minor
amount of damage from our fight...

We'll need your help when the final battle comes. 
Until then, please rest in the square alongside my other friends.
Oh, another one of those crystal things...

I remember this...
This is after I had just bombed a presentation.

To try to make my dream to produce anime come true,
I went door-to-door, pitching to several different companies.

I wanted my work to spread all around the world...
and to reach Inori and the others.

That's why, on the cover of my pitch deck, 
I had a character who looked a lot like you, {player}.

I still have no idea what all of this is supposed to mean.
Let's continue our investigation.

Hey, hey, hey!
You've been sent by Parallelmon to take me out, huh!
Another one? Do you know this one, too?
No... I've never met this Digimon in my life.

I was just about to come over to ya and pay my respects, personally!
You've got guts, to come at me first!
Wait. You're...

So you've noticed. 
I, too, have been entrusted with a "GAKU-RAN."
Yeah. That's...
...a pretty impressive fake.
Huh?!

I know your type. A poser. A wannabe. 
Somebody who buys all the best gear but can't back it up.

Look, I'm flattered you look up to me, 
but these "GAKU-RAN" don't just grow on trees.

And since my jacket is the real deal, 
it can only mean that yers is nothin' but a fake.
Wait. This isn't fake... We're from two different—

Like I'm gonna wait just 'cause YOU say so!
C'mon. It's time for yer beatdown!

"CALLED OUT! That's a big accusation from a little Bancho! 
You don't want to miss this fight!"
Damn it! How could I lose to a phony like this?!

I've come to a conclusion after our fight. 
You are indeed a Bancho worthy of my respect.
Of course I am! You're the one who's a fraud!

I'm no fraud. And I'm not someone 
who takes my title of Bancho lightly, either.
Now, listen to me, my brother.

Hehe! Sorry 'bout that! 
I suppose I got a bit carried away with the name callin' and stuff.

I get it now... So you're some kinda Bancho
from another dimension, huh?

I'm asking you to fight by my side, brother,
so we can all go back to our original world.
Will you join me for a "collab"?
A "collab"...?
It's a bond forged between those who bump fists.
Yeah! That sounds fire!
How does BanchoLeomon keep doing this?!

Speaking of fists, I imagine my fists gave you quite the beating...
You should take some time to recover.

I'll show you where our friends are currently resting. 
We're going to need your strength for the final battle.
Another glowing crystal...!

At last, the day my anime was to be presented
to the public finally arrived...
...but it was the beginning of the end of the world.

Some kind of rift opened up in the sky above the Tokyo
Metropolitan Government Building, and there was a flash.

I was lucky enough to escape underground...
but it was a living hell from that day onward.

I just focused on capturing it all on camera,
the world as it ended...

I'm not sure I understand it all, but it sounds like
your world is facing quite the predicament...

It must have been fate that brought us together here. 
Please let me know if there is anything I can do to help.
After all, we're in this "collab" together, right?

The bond forged between those who bump fists...
That's not something to be taken lightly.

Thank you. For now, though, I really, really have to
get back to my original world.
There are people waiting to see my videos...
*panting* There you are!

Something happened to the warrior in white! 
I thought I should let you know immediately!
What?!
Come on. Let's go back!
